title: Korak 10

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]
        path_to_target.append(value_at_middle)
        
        if value == value_at_middle:
            return path_to_target
        break
    
    return []
challengeFiles.seed:
def binary_search(search_list, value):
    path_to_target = []
    low = 0
    high = len(search_list) - 1
    
    while low <= high:
        mid = (low + high) // 2
        value_at_middle = search_list[mid]
        path_to_target.append(value_at_middle)
        
        if value == value_at_middle:
            return path_to_target
        break
    
    return []

tests.text: Trebalo bi da napravite funkcionalski poziv za binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 3) i odštampate ga odmah.
Trebalo bi da napravite funkcionalski poziv za binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 9], 4) i odštapišete ga odmah.

description:
Zapamti da funkcija prima listu pod nazivom search_list i value koju tražiš.

Sada, izvrši funkzioni poziv za binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 3) i binary_search([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 9], 4) i ispisi te pozive odmah.
